same_tissue_lineage_correction.description: Within-tissue direction instability with top-100 variance gene removal

variance_gene_sweep.description: Removing increasing fractions of highest-variance genes from global LINCS
variance_gene_sweep.result: Even removing 800/978 genes (82%) only achieves rho=0.81

lincs_rho_clarification.description: The rho=0.83 cited is the HDAC gradient (20 drugs), not global ranking

process_view_comparison.description: Tissue-level D (aggregate per tissue) vs cell-line-level D

within_tissue_vs_all_tissue_D.description: Within-heme D is systematically lower than all-tissue D

key_insight: Direction instability is intrinsically robust to feature-subset corrections in high-dimensional spaces. The correction only bites in low-N within-class comparisons (HDAC gradient n=20: rho=0.83; within-essential n=855: rho=0.88). Global rankings are near-perfectly preserved regardless of which features are removed.
